app.name: GeoMhls
app.tagline: Stay connected with your people, wherever they are

auth.welcomeSub: See where your people are, in real time
auth.name: Your name

onboarding.slide1Sub: Live locations of your circles, always up to date
onboarding.slide2Sub: Messages, emojis and sounds — instantly delivered
onboarding.slide3Sub: Family, friends, colleagues — one invite code away

groups.title: Circles
groups.emptySub: Create one or join with an invite code

profile.title: Profile
profile.freezeLocationSub: Others see your last known position

landing.heroSub: Stay connected with your family, friends, and circles in real time. See everyone on the map, chat instantly, feel safe.

f1.desc: Real-time GPS tracking shows exactly where your circle members are, right now. Beautiful markers with avatars update every few seconds. Zoom in, fly to a friend — all powered by Mapbox GL with stunning dark and light map styles.

f2.desc: Organize your world into circles — family, friends, colleagues. Each circle gets its own invite code, emoji, and color. Share a 6-digit code and your people are in. No phone numbers needed, no contact syncing.

f3.desc: Every circle has its own chat room. Send messages, pick emojis from a full emoji picker, see who's typing in real time. Notification sounds keep you in the loop even when you're away. All messages delivered instantly via WebSocket.

tutorial.title: Getting Started Is Easy
tutorial.step1d: Sign up with email or Google in seconds. Choose your name and avatar to be recognized on the map.
tutorial.step2d: Create a circle for family, friends, or colleagues. Share the 6-digit invite code — no contact sync needed.
tutorial.step3d: Enable location sharing and see everyone on the map in real time. Chat, track, and stay connected.

safety.desc: Your location is only shared with circles you choose. Toggle sharing off anytime with one tap. No ads, no data selling. All connections are encrypted with JWT and WebSocket security.

cta.desc: Join thousands of people who trust GeoMhls to keep their circles close. Free to use, no credit card required.

footer.desc: Stay connected with your people, wherever they are. Real-time location sharing for the ones who matter most.

chat.msg3: I can see you on the map!

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
